name: Slow Cooker Ham Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz can cream of mushroom soup
1/2 cup evaporated milk, or scalded milk
1/2 cup grated Romano cheese, or grated Parmesan cheese
1/4 cup dry sherry, or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
Combine all ingredients except spaghetti and butter in Crock-Pot; stir well. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours.
Just before serving, cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain and toss with butter. Stir into Crock-Pot. Sprinkle additional grated cheese over top.
This recipe may be doubled for the 5 quart Crock-Pot.
